name: CEC 2017 Bound-Constrained Real-Parameter Optimization
description: CEC 2017 benchmark suite config (29 active functions; reference F2 is deleted in the official evaluator).

functions.note: KNOWN ISSUE (C reference bug): schaffer_F7_func reads stale global y[] written by previous hybrid component (ackley) sr_func, not its own. pyMOFL implements SchafferF7 correctly; the golden data contains the C bug.
KNOWN ISSUE (C reference bug): schaffer_F7_func reads stale global y[] written by previous hybrid component (schwefel) sr_func. Same bug as F14.
